name: Supernatural Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 pound bittersweet chocolate, chopped into 1/4-inch pieces
1 pound semisweet chocolate, chopped into 1/4-inch pieces
2 cups dark brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Butter and line a 12 x 18-inch jelly roll pan with buttered parchment or foil.
2. Place the chocolate pieces in a heatproof bowl. Pour boiling water into a saucepan large enough to fit the bowl, and bring to a simmer. Place the bowl over the water, stirring occasionally until melted.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk eggs together with salt, granulated sugar, dark brown sugar, and vanilla extract. Gradually stir in the melted chocolate mixture, then fold in flour.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
5. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the top forms a shiny crust and the center is mostly set. Cool completely in the pan on a rack.
6. Wrap the cooled brownies tightly in plastic wrap and store at room temperature or refrigerated up to 3 days.
Variations: Add 4 cups (1 pound) chopped walnuts or pecans to the batter before folding in flour.
Yield: 50 brownies
